sections.label: Technique
sections.placeholder: Multidetector CT of the liver acquired before and after intravenous iodinated contrast. Multiplanar reformats reviewed. State kVp/contrast volume/phase and DLP as per local dose policy.

sections.label: Comparison
sections.placeholder: Date and type of relevant prior imaging, if available.

sections.label: Findings
sections.placeholder:
Liver: size, contour, parenchymal attenuation (steatosis/iron), cirrhosis/portal hypertension signs.
Focal observation(s) — for EACH: number, Couinaud segment, maximum diameter (mm).
LI-RADS v2018 major features per observation: nonrim arterial-phase hyperenhancement (APHE) present/absent; nonperipheral "washout" on portal-venous/delayed phase; enhancing "capsule"; threshold growth (>=50% in <=6 mo / new >=10 mm / >=100% in >6 mo).
Ancillary features (favouring malignancy or benignity) and LR-M targetoid features (rim APHE, peripheral washout, delayed central enhancement) if present.
Assigned LI-RADS category per observation (LR-1/2/3/4/5/M/TIV/NC).
Vascular: portal and hepatic veins — patency vs bland vs tumour-in-vein (LR-TIV).
Biliary tree; gallbladder; spleen; pancreas; adrenals.
Ascites / varices / lymphadenopathy; treated observations (LR-TR viable/equivocal/nonviable) if prior locoregional therapy.

sections.label: Impression
sections.placeholder: Concise prioritised bullets. Lead with the highest-category observation (LR-TIV > LR-5 > LR-M > LR-4 > LR-3), each stated with its LI-RADS v2018 category, Couinaud segment, and maximum diameter (mm). Management implication: LR-5 = definite HCC, refer to MDT/tumour board; LR-M = probable non-HCC malignancy, recommend biopsy/MDT; LR-4 = probably HCC, multidisciplinary review or short-interval follow-up; LR-3 = continue surveillance per approved interval; LR-1/2 = benign. Note any tumour-in-vein. Use only approved follow-up phrasing.

sections.label: Recommendations
sections.placeholder: Evidence-based follow-up or correlation, drawn from approved phrasing, only if indicated.
